code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut total = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  while i <= n
    mut is_end = false
    if i == n
      is_end = true
    end
    mut b = 0
    if not is_end
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
    end
    let is_space = is_end or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if is_space
      if in_num
        let val = cur * sign
        total = total + val
        if first
          out = "#{total}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{total}"
        end
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      sign = 1
      in_num = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print(out)
end
